meaning: (Knight或Dame)Grand Cross (of the Order) of St. Michael andSt. George(英国)(获)圣迈克尔和圣乔治大十字勋章(的爵士或女爵士)
examples: The U.S. GCMG team makes extra money moonlighting, advising foreign member firms on U.S. filings.
PwC U.S. GCMG performed, over the years, additional consulting and transaction advisory work for Satyam, in spite of their status as an audit client.
